selectedStarStories.title: Built enterprise Copilot adoption visibility for license decisions
selectedStarStories.situation: The company needed visibility into whether licensed users were actually using M365 Copilot and whether license expansion or reduction decisions were justified.
selectedStarStories.task: Build a systematic adoption dashboard that combined usage, license, and user-group data into actionable views.
selectedStarStories.action: Integrated Copilot audit logs, user exports, distribution lists, and license data into Power BI, tracked 24 Copilot applications, and set daily 8 AM refresh with department KPI views.
selectedStarStories.result: Made enterprise AI adoption quantifiable and supported usage-based license, adoption, and training decisions against the IS department active-usage target.
cvBullets: Built an enterprise M365 Copilot adoption dashboard integrating audit logs, user exports, distribution lists, and license data to make AI usage and license value visible.

selectedStarStories.title: Assumed ownership of production HR automation flows after handover
selectedStarStories.situation: Multiple production HR automation flows and related systems risked unclear ownership after a handover from Alex Wu.
selectedStarStories.task: Complete TOI and take over monitoring, troubleshooting, and operational requirements for scheduled HR automation flows.
selectedStarStories.action: Took over flows covering AI Screening, COE PDFs, Japan synchronization, Taiwan attendance import, leave/travel/LOA data, and documented client secret renewal, service account ownership, publish-solution dependency, and manual refresh constraints.
selectedStarStories.result: Preserved continuity of scheduled HR automation operations across Workday, Azure Blob, Dataverse, Jenkins, Synapse, SharePoint, and Power BI after TOI completion.
cvBullets: Assumed operational ownership of production HR automation flows spanning Workday, Azure Blob, Dataverse, Jenkins, Synapse, SharePoint, and Power BI after TOI completion.

selectedStarStories.title: Delivered Talent Acquisition dashboard from prototype through UAT resolution
selectedStarStories.situation: HR leaders needed better visibility into hiring progress, funnel bottlenecks, source effectiveness, new hire quality, and new hire pay.
selectedStarStories.task: Build recruiting analytics reports from requirements and prototype through development, UAT, and go-live readiness.
selectedStarStories.action: Designed and developed five Talent Acquisition sub-reports, built KPI cards and funnel/source views, and resolved UAT issues including Evergreen JR exclusion, offer acceptance formula, and DateTimezone bugs.
selectedStarStories.result: Delivered a recruiting analytics platform with daily refresh, 47 UAT issues resolved, and source effectiveness data covering 51,865 applications.
cvBullets: Delivered recruiting analytics dashboards from requirements and prototype through development, UAT fixes, and go-live for hiring progress, funnel, source, quality, and pay analysis.

selectedStarStories.title: Automated customer-service chatbot knowledge-base synchronization
selectedStarStories.situation: The customer-service AI chatbot depended on knowledge-base content, and manual article upload was slow and error-prone for Global and Japan consumer support operations.
selectedStarStories.task: Create a more reliable daily synchronization process between the source knowledge base and the chatbot workspace.
selectedStarStories.action: Built a three-stage Power Automate synchronization flow using Eureka API, Excel tracking, and chatbot workspace update logic, with separate flows for retrieving Eureka data, updating chatbot content, and mapping chatbot IDs.
selectedStarStories.result: Daily KB synchronization replaced manual article upload risk and supported ongoing chatbot content operations across Global and Japan markets.
cvBullets: Built daily chatbot knowledge-base synchronization using Power Automate and Eureka API, reducing manual article upload risk and keeping chatbot content aligned with source KB updates.

selectedStarStories.title: Stabilized post-launch customer-service AI chatbot operations
selectedStarStories.situation: After launch, the customer-service AI chatbot required continuous change handling, issue tracking, vendor coordination, and validation across Global and Japan workspaces.
selectedStarStories.task: Keep chatbot operations stable while handling post-launch change requests, bugs, reporting issues, and production content risks.
selectedStarStories.action: Managed workspace operations, tracked change requests and operation logs, coordinated vendor/business escalation, validated fixes in staging before production, and handled issues including telephone-number exposure, JP chat reporting, and JP CSAT decline.
selectedStarStories.result: Supported sustained chatbot operations through 193 post-launch change request and bug-fix versions and 88 operation log versions while keeping business and vendor issue handling traceable.
cvBullets: Owned configuration and operations for a customer-service AI chatbot across Global and Japan consumer support markets, covering workspace administration, routing, content guidance, KB automation, production issue tracking, and vendor coordination.

selectedStarStories.title: Replaced subjective chatbot platform comparison with data-driven evaluation
selectedStarStories.situation: Decision makers needed to compare TOMO and the enterprise customer-service AI platform for Global and Japan consumer chatbot scenarios without relying on subjective impressions.
selectedStarStories.task: Create a defensible evaluation framework with benchmark results, real transcript evidence, human review, and live traffic metrics.
selectedStarStories.action: Combined Golden Question Test datasets, real transcript GPT scoring, human review validation, and live A/B test planning; defined scoring standards and five reporting metric areas.
selectedStarStories.result: Produced quantitative comparison evidence including Global and Japan benchmark results, giving stakeholders a structured basis for platform selection.
cvBullets: Created a structured chatbot platform evaluation framework combining benchmark questions, transcript scoring, human review, and live A/B metrics to support data-driven platform selection.
